title: Option Text
text: Option Text Text to be displayed for the related action in the pop-up menu of the drag-and-drop format. Table 1. Default Values Menu Option Default Option Text Move Move Here Copy Copy Here Create Shortcut Create Shortcut(s) Here Cancel Cancel Description For most menu actions, if no Option Text is provided, the action is not allowed for the drag-and-drop format. However, the Cancel action is always enabled, even if the Option Text is empty. Applies To Drag-and-Drop Formats Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
